segments.text: Alright, so Doner's in a tight spot here, almost got shipwrecked but he's gonna make it.
segments.original_text: Pero bueno, vamos a ver aquí este Doner que está encontrado, casi lo ha shipwrecked, pero bueno, no va a pasar.

full_text: Alright, so Doner's in a tight spot here, almost got shipwrecked but he's gonna make it. And there's Dash.
